metadata.flavorText: The last thing a poacher in the Krosan Forest hears is the brutal sound of claws tearing flesh.

customAttributes.flavorText: The last thing a poacher in the Krosan Forest hears is the brutal sound of claws tearing flesh.

formattedAttributes.Flavor: The last thing a poacher in the Krosan Forest hears is the brutal sound of claws tearing flesh.

metadata.flavorText: Bears get vicious when they don't sleep. This one hasn't slept in ages.

customAttributes.flavorText: Bears get vicious when they don't sleep. This one hasn't slept in ages.

formattedAttributes.Flavor: Bears get vicious when they don't sleep. This one hasn't slept in ages.

metadata.flavorText: When the prey in Krosa no longer satisfied them, the beasts began to hunt their hunters.

customAttributes.flavorText: When the prey in Krosa no longer satisfied them, the beasts began to hunt their hunters.

formattedAttributes.Flavor: When the prey in Krosa no longer satisfied them, the beasts began to hunt their hunters.

metadata.flavorText: The landbound envy the birds' ultimate freedom in the sky.

customAttributes.flavorText: The landbound envy the birds' ultimate freedom in the sky.

formattedAttributes.Flavor: The landbound envy the birds' ultimate freedom in the sky.

metadata.flavorText: It's not slow. It's deciding whether to stomp you or gore you.

customAttributes.flavorText: It's not slow. It's deciding whether to stomp you or gore you.

formattedAttributes.Flavor: It's not slow. It's deciding whether to stomp you or gore you.

metadata.flavorText: When elephants thunder, death is lightning quick.

customAttributes.flavorText: When elephants thunder, death is lightning quick.

formattedAttributes.Flavor: When elephants thunder, death is lightning quick.

metadata.flavorText: They rarely question their orders. of course, they rarely understand them.

customAttributes.flavorText: They rarely question their orders. of course, they rarely understand them.

formattedAttributes.Flavor: They rarely question their orders. of course, they rarely understand them.

metadata.flavorText: Never underestimate the power of overwhelming stupidity in overwhelming numbers.

customAttributes.flavorText: Never underestimate the power of overwhelming stupidity in overwhelming numbers.

formattedAttributes.Flavor: Never underestimate the power of overwhelming stupidity in overwhelming numbers.

metadata.flavorText: If insects could talk, they world would be deafened.

customAttributes.flavorText: If insects could talk, they world would be deafened.

formattedAttributes.Flavor: If insects could talk, they world would be deafened.

metadata.flavorText: The nauseating wriggling of a saproling is exceeded only by the nauseating wriggling of its prey.

customAttributes.flavorText: The nauseating wriggling of a saproling is exceeded only by the nauseating wriggling of its prey.

formattedAttributes.Flavor: The nauseating wriggling of a saproling is exceeded only by the nauseating wriggling of its prey.

metadata.flavorText: Duty brings them together. Loyalty keeps them together.

customAttributes.flavorText: Duty brings them together. Loyalty keeps them together.

formattedAttributes.Flavor: Duty brings them together. Loyalty keeps them together.

metadata.flavorText: The joy of rebirth overshadows the sadness of death.

customAttributes.flavorText: The joy of rebirth overshadows the sadness of death.

formattedAttributes.Flavor: The joy of rebirth overshadows the sadness of death.

metadata.flavorText: It's surprising how well cute and vicious go together.

customAttributes.flavorText: It's surprising how well cute and vicious go together.

formattedAttributes.Flavor: It's surprising how well cute and vicious go together.
